mapper.select: SELECT v.id as "id", v.product_id as "productId", v.sku as "sku" FROM product_variants v WHERE v.product_id = #{id} ORDER BY v.sku

SELECT ma.id as "assetId", pm.product_id as "productId", ma.cdn_url as "cdnUrl", ma.thumbnail_url as "thumbnailUrl", ma.medium_url as "mediumUrl", ma.zoom_url as "zoomUrl", ma.type as "type", ma.alt_text as "altText", pm.is_primary as "primary", pm.sort_order as "sortOrder" FROM product_media pm JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.id = pm.asset_id WHERE pm.product_id = #{id} ORDER BY pm.is_primary DESC, pm.sort_order ASC

SELECT p.id as "id", p.name as "name", p.description as "description", p.short_description as "shortDescription", p.brand as "brand", p.category_id as "categoryId", c.name as "categoryName", p.slug as "slug", p.meta_title as "metaTitle", p.meta_description as "metaDescription", p.state_id as "stateId", p.flow_id as "flowId", p.base_price as "basePrice", p.base_price as "sellingPrice", p.base_price as "mrp", p.hsn_code as "hsnCode", p.country_of_origin as "countryOfOrigin", p.weight_grams as "weightGrams", p.tax_category as "taxCategory", p.warranty_months as "warrantyMonths", p.is_active as "isActive", p.is_returnable as "isReturnable", p.return_window_days as "returnWindowDays", p.created_by as "createdBy", p.created_time as "createdTime", p.last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.slug = #{slug}
SELECT count(*) FROM products p WHERE p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED' AND (p.name LIKE #{q} OR p.description LIKE #{q} OR p.brand LIKE #{q})

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.short_description as "shortDescription", p.brand, p.category_id as "categoryId", c.name as "categoryName", p.slug, p.state_id as "stateId", p.base_price as "basePrice", p.base_price as "sellingPrice" FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED' AND (p.name LIKE #{q} OR p.description LIKE #{q} OR p.brand LIKE #{q}) ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED' AND (c.id = #{categoryId} OR c.parent_id = #{categoryId})

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.short_description as "shortDescription", p.brand, p.category_id as "categoryId", c.name as "categoryName", p.slug, p.state_id as "stateId", p.base_price as "basePrice", p.base_price as "sellingPrice" FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.state_id = 'PUBLISHED' AND (c.id = #{categoryId} OR c.parent_id = #{categoryId}) ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT id, name, slug, parent_id as "parentId", path, depth, display_order as "displayOrder", active FROM categories WHERE active = true ORDER BY depth, display_order

SELECT p.id as "id", p.name as "name", p.description as "description", p.short_description as "shortDescription", p.brand as "brand", p.category_id as "categoryId", c.name as "categoryName", p.slug as "slug", p.meta_title as "metaTitle", p.meta_description as "metaDescription", p.state_id as "stateId", p.flow_id as "flowId", p.base_price as "basePrice", p.base_price as "sellingPrice", p.base_price as "mrp", p.hsn_code as "hsnCode", p.country_of_origin as "countryOfOrigin", p.weight_grams as "weightGrams", p.tax_category as "taxCategory", p.warranty_months as "warrantyMonths", p.is_active as "isActive", p.is_returnable as "isReturnable", p.return_window_days as "returnWindowDays", p.created_by as "createdBy", p.last_modified_by as "lastModifiedBy", p.created_time as "createdTime", p.last_modified_time as "lastModifiedTime" FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", COUNT(*) as "count" FROM products GROUP BY state_id ORDER BY "count" DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM products WHERE state_id = 'UNDER_REVIEW'

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.description, p.short_description as "shortDescription", p.brand, p.category_id as "categoryId", c.name as "categoryName", p.slug, p.state_id as "stateId", p.created_by as "createdBy", p.created_time as "createdTime" FROM products p LEFT JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.state_id = 'UNDER_REVIEW' ${orderby} ${pagination}

SELECT v.id as "id", v.product_id as "productId", v.sku as "sku", p.name as "productName", p.state_id as "productState", va.attribute_key as "attributeKey", va.attribute_value as "attributeValue" FROM product_variants v JOIN products p ON v.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN variant_attributes va ON va.variant_id = v.id WHERE v.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY v.id, va.attribute_key

SELECT v.id as "id", v.product_id as "productId", v.sku as "sku", p.name as "productName", p.state_id as "productState" FROM product_variants v JOIN products p ON v.product_id = p.id WHERE v.sku = #{sku}

SELECT v.id as "variantId", v.product_id as "productId", v.sku as "sku", p.name as "productName", p.state_id as "productState" FROM product_variants v JOIN products p ON v.product_id = p.id WHERE v.id = #{variantId} AND v.product_id = #{productId} AND p.state_id IN ('PUBLISHED', 'ACTIVE')

SELECT ma.id as "assetId", pm.product_id as "productId", ma.cdn_url as "cdnUrl", ma.thumbnail_url as "thumbnailUrl", ma.medium_url as "mediumUrl", ma.zoom_url as "zoomUrl", ma.type as "type", ma.alt_text as "altText", pm.is_primary as "primary", pm.sort_order as "sortOrder" FROM product_media pm JOIN media_assets ma ON ma.id = pm.asset_id WHERE pm.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY pm.is_primary DESC, pm.sort_order ASC

SELECT pav.id as "id", pav.product_id as "productId", pav.attribute_id as "attributeId", ad.code as "attributeCode", ad.label as "attributeLabel", ad.input_type as "inputType", pav.option_id as "optionId", ao.label as "optionLabel", pav.raw_value as "rawValue" FROM product_attribute_values pav JOIN attribute_definitions ad ON ad.id = pav.attribute_id LEFT JOIN attribute_options ao ON ao.id = pav.option_id WHERE pav.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY ad.display_order

SELECT ad.id as "id", ad.code as "code", ad.label as "label", ad.input_type as "inputType", ad.filterable as "filterable", ad.searchable as "searchable", ad.required as "required", ad.display_order as "displayOrder" FROM attribute_definitions ad JOIN category_attributes ca ON ca.attribute_id = ad.id WHERE ca.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY ad.display_order
SELECT product_id as "productId", tag as "tag" FROM product_tags WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY tag

SELECT id, product_id as "productId", activity_name as "activityName", activity_comment as "activityComment", activity_success as "activitySuccess", created_time as "createdTime", created_by as "createdBy" FROM product_activity_log WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY created_time ASC
